mapper.select: SELECT one_f.game_one_id, one_f.venue_code, one_f.game_two_id, one_f.status, one_f.model, one_f.float_name_i18n_code, one_f.logo_icon_i18n_code, one_f.medium_icon_i18n_code, one_v.sort AS venueSort, two.sort AS twoSort, two.site_label_change_type as siteLabelChangeType FROM game_one_float_config one_f LEFT JOIN game_one_venue one_v ON one_v.game_one_id = one_f.game_one_id AND one_v.venue_code = one_f.venue_code AND one_v.currency_code = #{currencyCode} AND one_f.site_code = #{siteCode} LEFT JOIN game_two_class_info two ON two.id = one_f.game_two_id WHERE one_f.site_code = #{siteCode} AND (one_f.venue_code IS NULL OR one_v.sort IS NOT NULL) AND (one_f.game_two_id IS NULL OR two.sort IS NOT NULL)
